<!-- ATLAS-CARD:START -->
ATLAS-CARD-ID: `mazer-run-quality-metric-contract-v2`
- project: `Mazer`
- type: `feature`
- state: `review`
- priority: `High`
- owner: `Mazer`
- progress: `94%`
- autonomous implementation: `not_admitted`
- updated: `2026-07-15T11:08:55.437Z`

## Summary
Define and implement one versioned, topology-aware run-quality contract before downstream score, rank, leaderboard, achievement, or player-facing adoption.

## Objective
- Keep runtime, progression, reports, audits, calibration, and future receipts correlated to playable wrap-aware shortest-path truth while... [see journal/source]

## Acceptance criteria
- Every metric has a deterministic numerator, denominator, version, and undefined-state policy.
- Equally short valid routes score equivalently and legal edge wrap remains playable graph movement.
- 2 more item(s) in journal/source

## Discoveries
- Shortest-path corridor fidelity must use the union of every equally short route, not one generator solution path.
- 2 more item(s) in journal/source

## Next actions
- Review and merge Mazer draft PR #73 if the private/internal total and telemetry-only topology contract are accepted.
- After merge, admit downstream capture and player-results cards without redefining the v1 denominators.
- Keep historical receipts immutable and never synthesize missing topology metrics from previews.

## Blockers
- None

## Evidence
- Mazer draft PR #73 https://github.com/fawxzzy/mazer/pull/73
- 4 more item(s) in journal/source
<!-- ATLAS-CARD:END -->
preview.journalBody:
ATLAS-JOURNAL-EVENT-ID: `mazer-run-quality-metric-contract-v2-review-20260715`
- card: `mazer-run-quality-metric-contract-v2`
- idempotency: `mazer-run-quality-metric-contract-v2-review-20260715`
## Versioned run-quality and topology contract is review-ready
- kind: `review`
- state: `review`
- actor: `Mazer`
- occurred: `2026-07-15T11:08:55.437Z`

## Completed
- Unified runtime, progression, reporting, audit, calibration, and receipt score authority.
- Defined optimal/accepted steps, coverage, corridor union fidelity, exploration, revisits, Clean Run, Explorer, and undefined policies.
- Proved equal-route parity, legal wrap, reset, incomplete run, bounded storage, and historical immutability behavior.

## Discovered
- Topology metrics are private telemetry in this packet; downstream public score/rank adoption remains separately governed.

## Next
- Review PR #73, then merge or return focused contract feedback.

## Blockers
- None

## Evidence
- PR #73 / 371457cc
- 54/54 focused and 370/370 full serial tests passed
- Build, type check, calibration, and diff check passed

## Correlation
